Decoding: 0x1: Virtual stop relates to encoder position X_ENC.
0x1: Not inverted, active high: a high level on REFR stops the motor
0x1: Inverted, low active: a low level on REFL stops the motor
0x1: The P-controller ignores absolute errors below tolerance only when the pos_reached flag (M1_RAMP_STAT[9]) of the motion controller is set to 1.
